_comment: Pinned HO2_diag cold-corner authority seed for chem323 ignition_entry (~448 K, 30 kPa). Composition is linearly interpolated between table seed_points at 300 K/30 kPa and 616 K/96.9 kPa. Listed last in seed_species_miss_artifacts so dedupe retains this target alongside current_window_diag_target_limit.
